name: Akzo Nobel N.V.
h1: Akzo Nobel's GCC footprint in India
lede: Akzo Nobel runs three centers across three Indian cities. Pune, Bengaluru and Thane, covering GBS and R&D, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Akzo Nobel office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Akzo Nobel N.V. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Akzo Nobel runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru, Thane), covering GBS and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Akzo Nobel's India footprint covers Pune, Bengaluru and Thane, spanning GBS and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 73 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Akzo Nobel operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.a: Akzo Nobel's India footprint includes Pune and 2 additional cities.

faq.a: Akzo Nobel runs GBS and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Akzo Nobel's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
